case_title: SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. vs. BANKS, RUSS et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, RUSS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, RUSS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, RUSS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BANKS, RUSS AKA RUSSELL BANKS SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-21-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-03-1993

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN LEANDRO COLLECTION SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKS, RUSS $332.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $47.81 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $614.81
